summary: Q2 FY2026 earnings reported April 30, 2026. EPS $2.01 beat estimate of $1.94. Q3 FY2026 (June quarter) next earnings date not yet formally announced; typically reported late July. Company guided Q3 revenue +14% to +17% YoY.
